{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Forged snakes
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Long]] uses a [[Forged]] snake technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
